title: pelargonium × pseudociconium
intro: Pelargonium × pseudociconium, also known as Rose Geranium or Cape Rose, is a species of flowering plant within the Geraniaceae family. It is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antiviral qualities, which have been used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of Pelargonium × pseudociconium include relief from menstrual cramps, anxiety, and insomnia, as well as its ability to promote digestive health and reduce inflammation. The plant is often prepared as a tea, tincture, or essential oil, which can be used internally or applied topically to harness its medicinal properties.
